title: stellaria calycantha var. sitchana
intro: Stellaria calycantha var. sitchana, also known as starry wildflower or stellaria sitchana, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of stellaria sitchana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of stellaria sitchana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, wounds, and skin issues.
